{{Quote|I ain't seen one of these since I was prospecting on Subterrel, beyond the outer rim! This baby belongs to them cloners. What you got here is a Kamino saberdart...|[[Dexter Jettster/Legends|Dexter Jettster]]|<ref name="Episode 2">{{Film|II}}</ref>}}
The '''Velocity-7''' was a [[dart shooter]] produced by [[Prax Arms/Legends|Prax Arms]] during the final years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] had a Velocity-7 unit integrated into the right wrist gauntlet of his [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Mandalorian armor/Legends|battle armor]]. This was used when [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] shot [[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]] to prevent [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] from getting information out of him/her.

The Velocity-7 fired a dart through means of compressed air to achieve a much greater range—up to 100 meters, with an optimum range of ten meters—than that of other dart shooters. In addition, the Velocity-7 was designed to fire larger projectiles such as [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] [[Mk I Saberdart|saberdarts]], whereas other Prax Arms dart shooters only had the capacity to fire [[Flechette/Legends|microdarts]].<ref name="NEGWT" />
